verify.summary: 41/41 tests pass · order.ts uses n.deps which resolver now populates from consumes↔produces · no source changes needed

notes: src/core/order.ts (parallelOrder, order, batchConflicts) reads node.deps. The rewritten resolver (commit 6a2ef16) emits NodeSpec.deps derived from consumes↔produces, so frontier behavior follows the data-flow ordering automatically. Core graph algebra is agnostic to how deps were produced.
